nasb.text: Then Jacob replied to Laban, “Because I was afraid, for I thought that you would take your daughters from me by force.

esv.text: Jacob answered and said to Laban, “Because I was afraid, for I thought that you would take your daughters from me by force.

cnv.text: 雅各回答拉班，說：“我逃走，是因為我害怕，我心裡想：恐怕你會把你的女兒們從我的手中搶走。

ccb.text: 雅各对拉班说：“我逃跑是因为害怕你会夺回你的女儿。

csbs.text: 雅各就回应拉班说：“因为我害怕，我想你可能会从我这里夺去你的女儿们。
